title: Lophiolepis schelkownikowii
taxonomy: Lophiolepis schelkownikowii is a species of palm tree native to Mexico and Guatemala. It belongs to the family Arecaceae and is classified within the genus Lophiolepis. The genus Lophiolepis is part of the tribe Attaleeae and is closely related to the genus Coccothrinax. This classification suggests that Lophiolepis schelkownikowii shares characteristics with other species within the Arecaceae family. Further research is needed to confirm the exact relationships within the Attaleeae tribe.
